overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene from Hogwarts Legacy showing students in wizard robes gathered on the castle grounds near the Quidditch pitch. The stationary camera captures characters interacting and practicing with brooms against a backdrop of iconic castle towers and decorative banners under warm afternoon sunlight.

segments.scene_description: A static cinematic view of Hogwarts students gathered on the castle training grounds for a flying lesson. The warm afternoon light illuminates the iconic Quidditch goal towers—one with a golden roof and one with green copper patina—while red and gold pennant banners flutter between them. Students in house robes stand conversing on the grassy field, with one student in the center gesturing with a broomstick as the castle spires rise majestically in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static cinematic view of the Hogwarts training grounds, capturing a moment of student preparation under the glow of a warm afternoon sun. It begins with a wide focus on the grassy field where students in house robes gather and converse, with one central figure gesturing with a broomstick. As the eye moves upward, the scene expands to reveal the iconic Quidditch goal towers, contrasting a golden roof with a green copper patina. The view then shifts to the red and gold pennant banners fluttering in the breeze between the towers, before finally settling on the majestic castle spires rising in the distant background.
